title: Failure Memory Entry
description: Structured record of a past failure including the judgment rule that would have prevented it.

summary.description: One-sentence description of the observed failure

surface_symptom.description: What was noticed first (tests passed, user complaint, audit finding...)

root_judgment_failure.description: The missing or violated judgment element (intent, constraint, gate, memory...)

preventive_rule.description: The specific rule or check that would have caught or prevented this
